misc: Always a gentleman despite occasionally losing his temper on the course
biography: Daniel, a golfer known for his competitive spirit and occasional displays of temper on the course, is a familiar face at the Hector Trophée. Representing Oulujokilaakson Golfklubi ry, Daniel has participated in 7 previous Hector Trophée tournaments, securing the coveted Hector Trophée title twice. Despite the heat of competition, Daniel is always a gentleman.

While he has yet to claim the Victor Trophy, his consistent presence and determination make him a formidable opponent. His fellow competitors know him as a fierce competitor, and appreciate his dedication to the sport. Although he will not participate in Hector Trophée 2026, we can still hope that he will grace the field with his presence again soon.
